title: GeneratedComment
description: Output shape for a Claude-generated reply comment on a third-party post. Use with the Anthropic SDK structured-output / response_format flag so the model is forced to return parseable JSON.

comment.description: The reply text to be posted. No surrounding quotes, no boilerplate, no AI self-reference.

riskLevel.description: Posting-risk heuristic. high = could plausibly violate platform TOS or be flagged spammy.

reason.description: One-sentence justification for the riskLevel and shouldPost decision. Stored for audit, not shown to the end reader.

shouldPost.description: Final gate. False when riskLevel == high, when the source post is itself spam, or when no value-add reply is possible.

tone.description: Optional. The intent of the reply. Used downstream for variant balancing.
